response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Lyrics mapped successfully using the reference lyrics for 'Lifetime Showtime'. Disambiguated phonetic lines with the help of the reference.
2. Manual Transcription: Manually transcribed the entire outro segment from 02:13 to 05:01 as it was purely conversational and wasn't included in the reference lyrics.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles were synchronized precisely to the millisecond, prioritizing spoken audio vocals and applying truncation where appropriate to handle rapid speech.

subtitles.original: Make a break for it, it's playtime!

subtitles.original: ラフィアンズ！オラフィアンズ！
subtitles.english: Ruffians! Orufians!

subtitles.original: ようこそ！FUWAMOCO Wacha★Wacha Birthday Festivalへ！
subtitles.english: Welcome to our FUWAMOCO Wacha★Wacha Birthday Festival!

subtitles.original: Thank you so much for coming to celebrate our birthday with us, Ruffians!
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for coming to celebrate our birthday with us, Ruffians!

subtitles.original: 始まりました！
subtitles.english: It's started!

subtitles.original: 今日は私たちの3Dライブに来てくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for coming to our 3D live concert today!

subtitles.original: Well, to continue off from yesterday's Friday show, tonight again, today we have a big concert!
subtitles.english: Well, to continue off from yesterday's Friday show, tonight again, today we have a big concert!

subtitles.original: Can you believe it? It's already been three years!
subtitles.english: Can you believe it? It's already been three years!

subtitles.original: Right! Our third birthday in hololive English!
subtitles.english: Right! Our third birthday in hololive English!

subtitles.original: But, Mococo-chan, we can't forget the really important things, right?
subtitles.english: But, Mococo-chan, we can't forget the really important things, right?

subtitles.original: Huh? Introductions! Oh, yeah! Okay!
subtitles.english: Huh? Introductions! Oh, yeah! Okay!

subtitles.original: I'm not a Chihuahua! I'm Fuwawa!
subtitles.english: I'm not a Chihuahua! I'm Fuwawa!

subtitles.original: I'm not Fuwawa! I'm Mococo!
subtitles.english: I'm not Fuwawa! I'm Mococo!

subtitles.original: We are hololive English Advent's twin demon guard dog sisters! Together we're... FUWAMOCO! Bau bau!
subtitles.english: We are hololive English Advent's twin demon guard dog sisters! Together we're... FUWAMOCO! Bau bau!

subtitles.original: And we have an amazing birthday festival stage today!
subtitles.english: And we have an amazing birthday festival stage today!

subtitles.original: An amazing stage!
subtitles.english: An amazing stage!

subtitles.original: With such a big concert, too!
subtitles.english: With such a big concert, too!

subtitles.original: Mococo is also... Fuwawa! Mococo-chan! Okay, here we go! Three, two, one...
subtitles.english: Mococo is also... Fuwawa! Mococo-chan! Okay, here we go! Three, two, one...

subtitles.original: Bau bau!
subtitles.english: Bau bau!

subtitles.original: It's so big and wide! Yeah!
subtitles.english: It's so big and wide! Yeah!

subtitles.original: Thank you all for this big stage today!
subtitles.english: Thank you all for this big stage today!

subtitles.original: But singing and dancing today is not just going to be us, right?
subtitles.english: But singing and dancing today is not just going to be us, right?

subtitles.original: No! We're also here with some very special guests too!
subtitles.english: No! We're also here with some very special guests too!

subtitles.original: そう、今日はとっても素敵なゲストさんも来てるから、ぜひ楽しみにしてくださいね！
subtitles.english: Yes, we have some very wonderful guests with us today, so please look forward to it!

subtitles.original: そして、もう一人、謎のゲストさんも！誰かな？
subtitles.english: And another one, a mysterious guest! Who could it be?

subtitles.original: ラフィアンズ！オラフィアンズ！
subtitles.english: Ruffians! Orufians!

subtitles.original: But a birthday wouldn't be complete without this, right?
subtitles.english: But a birthday wouldn't be complete without this, right?

subtitles.original: Right! Something very important!
subtitles.english: Right! Something very important!

subtitles.original: Ah, I think you know what... but...
subtitles.english: Ah, I think you know what... but...

subtitles.original: ハッシュタグ！
subtitles.english: Hashtags!

subtitles.original: Right up here, you can see our birthday hashtag: #FWMCbday26 !
subtitles.english: Right up here, you can see our birthday hashtag: #FWMCbday26 !

subtitles.original: That it is! Please, please post your thoughts!
subtitles.english: That it is! Please, please post your thoughts!

subtitles.original: And take lots of photos! Screenshots are great too!
subtitles.english: And take lots of photos! Screenshots are great too!

subtitles.original: そう！ハッシュタグで感想を呟いてください！
subtitles.english: Yes! Please tweet your thoughts with the hashtag!

subtitles.original: 写真もね！後でポチしに行くからね！
subtitles.english: And photos too! We'll go check them out later!

subtitles.original: Bau bau! We will check all your thoughts after the show!
subtitles.english: Bau bau! We will check all your thoughts after the show!
